================================================================================
NPC LEVEL RANGE VALIDATION REPORT
================================================================================
Generated by validate_level_ranges.py
Expansion cap assumed: 80

METHODOLOGY
----------------------------------------
Wowhead tooltips show Chromie Time scaled level ranges which are
often HIGHER than the raw ContentTuning max. This is expected.
We only flag mismatches where:
  - WH min level is ABOVE CT max (NPC needs a higher-tier CT)
  - WH max level is BELOW CT min (NPC needs a lower-tier CT)
  - CT min is significantly above WH max (CT floor too high)
Universal scaling CTs (MaxLevelType=2) are always accepted.

SUMMARY
----------------------------------------
Wowhead NPCs with level data:     68,630
DB NPCs with ContentTuning:       180,523
NPCs in both sources:              68,561
Matching (OK):                     64,641
Total mismatches found:             3,920

  MIN LEVEL MISMATCH — CT floor too high for NPC: 0
